int generate_network_config_cmd(char* cmd_buffer, size_t buffer_size, const char* ip_addr, const char* netmask, const char* gateway) {
    // Validate input parameters
    if (cmd_buffer == NULL || buffer_size == 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    
    if (ip_addr == NULL || *ip_addr == '\0') {
        return -1;
    }
    
    if (netmask == NULL || *netmask == '\0') {
        return -1;
    }
    
    if (gateway == NULL || *gateway == '\0') {
        return -1;
    }

    // Calculate required lengths for validation
    size_t ip_len = strlen(ip_addr);
    size_t netmask_len = strlen(netmask);
    size_t gateway_len = strlen(gateway);
    size_t fixed_part_len = strlen("ip addr ") + strlen(" netmask ") + strlen(" gateway ");
    
    // Validate that all parts fit in buffer (accounting for null terminator)
    if (fixed_part_len + ip_len + netmask_len + gateway_len + 1 > buffer_size) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Initialize buffer
    cmd_buffer[0] = '\0';
    size_t current_length = 0;
    size_t remaining = buffer_size - 1; // Reserve space for null terminator

    // Build command using safe strncat with proper length tracking
    const char* part1 = "ip addr ";
    size_t part1_len = strlen(part1);
    strncat(cmd_buffer, part1, part1_len);
    current_length += part1_len;
    
    strncat(cmd_buffer, ip_addr, ip_len);
    current_length += ip_len;
    
    const char* part2 = " netmask ";
    size_t part2_len = strlen(part2);
    strncat(cmd_buffer, part2, part2_len);
    current_length += part2_len;
    
    strncat(cmd_buffer, netmask, netmask_len);
    current_length += netmask_len;

    strncat(cmd_buffer, part3, part3_len);
    current_length += part3_len;
    
    strncat(cmd_buffer, gateway, gateway_len);
    current_length += gateway_len;

    return 0;
}

int generate_network_config_cmd(char* cmd_buffer, size_t buffer_size, const char* ip_addr, const char* netmask, const char* gateway) {

    if (ip_addr == NULL || ip_addr[0] == '\0' ||

    if (buffer_size < required_length) {
        return -1;
